---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for the Instagram Downloader Skill
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear and concise description of what the problem is. E.g., "I'm always frustrated when [...]"

## Describe the Solution You'd Like

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Describe Alternatives You've Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case

How would this feature be used? Who would benefit from it?

## Implementation Ideas (optional)

If you have ideas on how to implement this, share them here:

- Relevant libraries or APIs
- Where in the codebase changes would go
- Any prior art or references

## Additional Context

Add any other context, screenshots, or references about the feature request here.
